title: Bolsius Reed Diffuser - True Joy - Floral Blessings - Lasts for up to 10 Weeks - Natural Extracts - No Alcohol Formula - Transparent - Recyclable Glass - 80 ml
features: Take some time out for yourself with Floral Blessings! These fragrance sticks subtly spread their rich floral fragrance for up to 10 weeks. Made without alcohol and using natural extracts - with love for people and planet.

Inspired by fragrances from nature and made with natural extracts. Its composition contains no alcohol. The fresh, summer fragrance gradually spreads through the room and lingers for a long time; for up to 10 weeks.

Floral Blessings combines the cheerful fragrances of orange blossom, jasmine, rose and juicy orange with an undertone of musk. Discover this irresistible feel-good fragrance of a garden full of fragrant blossoms which will help you relax!
description: From the manufacturer Bolsius True Joy The True Joy collection is inspired by the full fragrances from nature. Create a gentle and natural atmosphere in any room with a seductive room perfume from Bolsius. product_details_tab_data.Safety Warning: Place the product in a place where the fragrance can spread well, but not next to or on any sources of heat. Make sure you have a firm surface to prevent the product from falling over and keep it out of children's reach. You don't need to turn the sticks over. Did you know that your nose can get used to a certain fragrance and that you can no longer smell it yourself over time? It's therefore a good idea to switch fragrances regularly in your home so that you can continue to enjoy them at their best.
